##NETSTAT_HOME
EZD0101I NETSTAT CS V2R5 TCPIP 065
HOME ADDRESS LIST:
LINKNAME:   EZASAMEMVS
  ADDRESS:  10.1.1.1
    FLAGS:
LINKNAME:   EZAXCFS1
  ADDRESS:  10.1.1.1
    FLAGS:
LINKNAME:   LOOPBACK
  ADDRESS:  127.0.0.1
    FLAGS:
INTFNAME:   QDIOLE2
  ADDRESS:  10.1.1.2
    FLAGS:  PRIMARY
INTFNAME:   HPRIP
  ADDRESS:  10.1.1.1
    FLAGS:
INTFNAME:   LOOPBACK6
  ADDRESS:  ::1
    TYPE:   LOOPBACK
    FLAGS:
6 OF 6 RECORDS DISPLAYED
END OF THE REPORT
##PROFILE
;;SOURCE_DSN=TCPIP.TCPPARMS(PROFILE1)
ARPAGE 20
GLOBALCONFIG NOTCPIPSTATISTICS
IPCONFIG DATAGRAMFWD
SOMAXCONN 10
TCPCONFIG TTLS
TCPCONFIG TCPSENDBFRSIZE 16K TCPRCVBUFRSIZE 16K SENDGARBAGE FALSE
UDPCONFIG RESTRICTLOWPORTS

INTERFACE QDIOLE2
  DEFINE    IPAQENET
  IPADDR    10.1.1.2/24
  PORTNAME  QDIOE2
; INBPERF   DYNAMIC WORKLOADQ VMAC
;
START QDIOLE2
;
INTERFACE   HPRIP
   DEFINE   VIRTUAL
   IPADDR   10.1.1.1
IPCONFIG DYNAMICXCF 10.1.1.1/24 2
BEGINRoutes
 ROUTE 10.1.1.0/24       =        QDIOLE2   MTU 1500
 ROUTE DEFAULT          10.1.1.254  QDIOLE2   MTU DEFAULTSIZE
ENDRoutes
AUTOLOG
;;  PORTMAP              ; PORTMAP
    FTPD                 ; FTP Server
    TN3270               ; TelNet Server
;;  CTSGATE              ; ControlSA
ENDAUTOLOG
PORT
     7 UDP MISCSERV            ; Miscellaneous Server
     7 TCP MISCSERV
    21 TCP FTPD1               ; FTP Server
;   25 TCP SMTPX               ; SMTP Server
    23 TCP TN3270              ; Telnet Server
SACONFIG ENABLED COMMUNITY public AGENT 161
SACONFIG OSAENABLED OSASF 721
  SMFCONFIG TYPE118 TCPINIT TCPTERM FTPCLIENT TN3270CLIENT
                    TCPIPSTATISTICS
  SMFCONFIG TYPE119 DVIPA FTPCLIENT IFSTATISTICS IPSECURITY
                    PORTSTATISTICS PROFILE
